member.name: T:Core.Interfaces.Service.ITokenService
member.summary: Defines the contract for JWT token generation, refresh, and revocation operations.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ITokenService.GenerateAccessTokenAsync(Core.Entities.ApplicationUser)
member.summary: Generates a signed JWT access token for the specified user.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ITokenService.GenerateRefreshTokenAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates and persists a new refresh token for the specified user.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ITokenService.RefreshTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and rotates a refresh token, returning a new token pair.
member.param: The refresh token string to validate.
member.returns: Result containing new AuthResponseDto if successful.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ITokenService.RevokeTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Revokes a refresh token, preventing future use.
member.param: The refresh token string to revoke.
